events.title: Dispute Resolution Through the Lens of Those Affected by it: London Principles Revisited
events.organiser: Chartered Institute of Arbitrators / Hawar Circle
events.summary: Panel discussion on Ciarb Centenary Principles examining what makes a safe seat for arbitration. LCIA Director General Kevin Nash speaking.

events.title: Dispute Resolution Through the Lens of Those Affected
events.summary: Event examining dispute resolution processes from the perspective of parties and affected stakeholders.

events.title: ICCA 2026
events.summary: Biennial flagship international arbitration congress bringing together leading arbitration practitioners, academics, and in-house counsel worldwide.

events.title: Award or Accord: Negotiation for Arbitration Advocates
events.summary: A skills training workshop focused on negotiation techniques for arbitration advocates, addressing practical strategies for resolving disputes through settlement discussions in international arbitration.

events.title: Document Production in International Arbitration
events.summary: Seminar examining document production procedures and practices in international arbitration proceedings.

events.title: IBA Annual Litigation Forum - The world has lost its compass: we need to talk about litigators!
events.summary: Major annual forum for litigation professionals addressing contemporary challenges facing litigators globally. Multi-day conference exploring current litigation themes and practice developments.

events.title: IBA Young Litigators Seminar 2026
events.summary: Single-day seminar designed for young litigators, focusing on practical litigation skills and professional development for early-career practitioners.

events.title: ADR Beyond Arbitration: Strategic Use of ADR in International Disputes
events.summary: Masterclass exploring strategic use of alternative dispute resolution methods beyond arbitration in international disputes, covering practical approaches to ADR in cross-border contexts.

events.title: Alternative Dispute Resolution Colloquium
events.summary: Colloquium on alternative dispute resolution methods supported by the LCIA held in London.

events.title: London Forum on Global Anti-Corruption, Compliance & Risk Management 2026
events.summary: Forum at The Royal Horseguards Hotel examining practical implementation of anti-corruption and compliance strategies, moving beyond theory to explore how organizations manage risk in practice.

events.title: ICC Tokyo Arbitration Day
events.summary: One-day ICC arbitration conference in Tokyo addressing regional and global trends in international commercial arbitration.

events.title: ELI UK-Hub Event Shaping the Future - Digital Assets and Artificial Intelligence in Legal Practice
events.organiser: British Institute of International and Comparative Law
events.summary: Marking ELI's 15th anniversary, this event explores digital assets and AI in legal practice, highlighting the institute's mission, global strategy, and engagement with judiciary and legal professionals.

events.title: European Branch Annual Conference: International arbitration and the rule of law
events.summary: CIArb European Branch annual conference exploring the intersection of international arbitration with the rule of law.

events.title: Prague Arbitration Day
events.summary: Annual one-day arbitration conference in Prague focusing on current issues in international arbitration and Central European practice.

events.title: 3rd Annual Forum on AI & Crypto Fraud and Asset Recovery
events.summary: Third annual forum at The Royal Horseguards Hotel focusing on evolving crypto fraud and emerging tools to combat it, including AI-driven detection and asset recovery strategies.

events.title: LCIA Tylney Hall Symposia
events.summary: Two-day symposium following LCIA's tradition of open forum discussion based on topics submitted by delegates in advance. Held at Tylney Hall.

events.title: YIAG Tylney Hall Symposium
events.summary: Half-day symposium preceding the LCIA Tylney Hall Symposium, featuring open forum discussion on topics submitted by delegates in advance of the event.

events.title: Scottish Branch AGM and Annual Lecture
events.summary: CIArb Scottish Branch Annual General Meeting followed by the Annual Lecture on dispute resolution topics.

events.title: Scottish Branch Annual Conference 2026
events.summary: Annual conference of CIArb's Scottish Branch covering current developments in arbitration and dispute resolution.

events.title: Countering ISDS Claims: Old Tensions and New Defences
events.organiser: British Institute of International and Comparative Law
events.summary: Roundtable bringing together academics and practitioners to discuss new defences increasingly advanced by host States in investor-state dispute settlement proceedings.

events.title: Johannesburg Arbitration Week 2026
events.summary: A flagship initiative positioning South Africa as a leading arbitration hub, designed for professionals shaping complex projects, investments and commercial relationships in international dispute resolution.

events.title: Chief Litigation Officer Summit 2026
events.summary: Invitation-only premium summit for senior litigation executives at Red Rock Casino Resort, Las Vegas, focusing on precision, efficiency and adaptability in complex legal environments.

events.title: Forum on Complex International Disputes Involving CEE and Central Asia
events.summary: Premier forum for practitioners, arbitrators and corporate counsel navigating arbitration and litigation across Central and Eastern Europe and Central Asia, featuring speakers from leading firms.

events.title: LCIA Tylney in Town Symposia - Mumbai
events.summary: Afternoon and evening symposium bringing the Tylney format to Mumbai with candid discussion, practical insight and connection opportunities.

events.summary: Conference bringing together senior arbitrators and counsel with experience in commercial, energy, mining and resources disputes, both domestic and international.

events.title: Johannesburg Arbitration Week 2026
events.summary: Week-long arbitration event supported by the LCIA bringing together the arbitration community in Johannesburg.

events.summary: Afternoon and evening symposium bringing the Tylney format to New Delhi with candid discussion, practical insight and connection opportunities.

events.summary: Fourth edition of Cyprus Arbitration Day focusing on international arbitration developments. Supported by the LCIA.

events.title: Arbitration and ADR Committee Meeting
events.summary: Committee meeting for ICC UK Arbitration and ADR Committee members to discuss policy and initiatives.

events.title: The Learning Lab
events.summary: Multi-week learning programme on dispute resolution topics hosted by CIArb, running from mid-May to late June 2026.

events.summary: Three-day training programme on effective advocacy skills in international arbitration, focusing on modern challenges and best practices for advocates in contemporary arbitration proceedings.
